name: testflows-connect

metadata.name: testflows.connect
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: Apache Software License

documentation:
# TestFlows - Connect

Minimal module to provide capabilities to connect to
and control CLI programs.

Currently supports only Python 3.6 or above.

## Installation

```bash
    $ ./build; ./install
```

where

```bash
    $ ./build
```

creates a pip installable package in `./dist`, for example

```bash
    $ ls dist/
    testflows.connect-1.2.190905.123636.tar.gz
```

and

```bash
    $ ./install
```

installs the `testflows.connect` module.

classes.name: testflows.connect.shell.Application
documentation:
Base class for all CLI applications
launched and controlled using uExpect.

classes.name: testflows.connect.shell.AsyncCommand

methods.name: testflows.connect.shell.AsyncCommand.close
documentation: Abort async command

methods.name: testflows.connect.shell.AsyncCommand.readlines
documentation: Return currently available output.
Asynchronous command.

classes.name: testflows.connect.shell.Shell

methods.name: testflows.connect.shell.Shell._send_command
documentation: Send command.

methods.name: testflows.connect.shell.Shell.__call__
documentation:
Execute shell command.

```
param command

command to execute

param timeout

time to wait for the next line of output

param total

time to wait for the command to complete
and return to the prompt, default: None (no limit)

param parser

output parser

param asynchronous

asynchronous command, default: None (not async)

param test

caller test
```

methods.name: testflows.connect.shell.Shell.subshell
documentation: Open subshell in the current shell.

Connection to shell application.

```
param command

command to launch shell, default: ["/bin/bash", "--noediting"]

param prompt

prompt, default: r'[#$] '

param change_prompt

command to change promptm default: None

param new_prompt

new prompt to set, default: None
```
